name: ArGo / Air 2 - Double Battery Charger UK
summary: ArGo / Air 2 - Double Battery Charger UK — a battery accessory for keeping your device powered.
description: Optimise the performance of your Arizer ArGo or Air 2 units with our specialized dual battery charger, enabling the convenient external charging of one or two additional 18650 batteries. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Keeps your device charged and ready.
